items.title: Segmentation export (YOLO-seg)
items.text: Turn on 'Export segmentation labels' (Settings → Storage) to write polygon outlines instead of boxes, so you can train instance segmentation (task=segment). Polygon and lasso shapes use their outline; other shapes use the box. Pairs perfectly with the new Polygon tool.

items.title: New Polygon tool
items.text: Click to drop points connected by straight lines (no dragging) and close by clicking the first point, double-clicking or pressing Enter. Perfect for irregular SFX shapes.

items.title: Updates tab & seamless auto-update
items.text: Settings → Updates: choose Automatic or Manual, install a specific version to roll back, and see your current version. Updates install themselves on next start with no restart prompt.

items.title: Background images & custom classes
items.text: Export empty pages as YOLO negatives, define your own detection classes, and export classes.txt + data.yaml with an optional train/val split — train any object detector, not just manga bubbles.
